privacy_intro: Easy Parking is committed to protecting your personal data and ensuring a secure experience. This policy explains how we collect and handle your information.
info_collection_content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a booking, or contact support. This includes your name, email, phone number, and vehicle details.
location_data_content: To provide real-time navigation and show nearby parking garages, we require access to your location. This data is only used while the app is active and for the purpose of enhancing your parking experience.
payment_info_content: All payments are processed securely through our partners (Stripe). We do not store your full credit card details on our servers. We only receive confirmation of your transaction.
data_security_content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
third_party_content: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information with trusted service providers necessary for app functionality (e.g., Map services and Payment processors).
privacy_questions_msg: If you have any questions about our privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact our support team.
support_team_msg: Our team is here to assist you with any parking issues.
faq_cancel: How do I cancel my booking?
faq_cancel_answer: You can cancel your booking from the 'My Bookings' section. If you cancel at least 1 hour before the start time, you may be eligible for a refund.
faq_extend: Can I extend my parking time?
faq_extend_answer: Yes, you can extend your booking if the slot is not reserved by someone else after your time expires.
faq_late_answer: If you arrive late, your spot will still be reserved until your booking ends. However, no extra time will be added.
faq_payment: How can I pay for parking?
faq_payment_answer: We support payments via Credit/Debit cards through Stripe, and Apple Pay/Google Pay.
faq_refund_answer: Deposits are refundable if the cancellation follows our refund policy (usually 1 hour before start time).
faq_lost_ticket: What if I lost my digital ticket?
faq_lost_ticket_answer: Don't worry! Your ticket is always available in the 'My Tickets' section of the app. Just show the QR code from there.
